---
title: "Uncertainty in Machine Learning"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles/custom.scss]
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls: true
    slide-number: false
---

## Slide 1

Lecture content will appear here.

## Slide 2

Lecture content will appear here.

```{=html}
<script src="scripts/smoke.js"></script>
```
